summary: A narrated montage set to music of a multi-agency ICE operation (dated May 25) at a cockfighting site in San Juan, Puerto Rico. Captions and a motion-blur zoom transition appear over handheld B-roll of a drive-in, the site, masked agents in body armor walking detainees through brush, and a group of detained people. The closing caption reads 'self-deport now.'

script.scene: POV from inside a moving vehicle crossing a causeway over water toward a coastal skyline; caption 'with the support of' over a blue-sky daytime drive-in.
Handheld shot of a fenced compound with striped tarps and green netting; caption 'took place at an illegal cockfight location'.
Masked agents in body armor escort a handcuffed man in a white shirt through wooded brush; other detainees and a vehicle marked POLICE are visible among the trees.
Motion-blur radial-zoom transition over a tight group of detained people with hands up, surrounded by armored agents; caption 'and strengthening our local law enforcement partnerships.'
A masked agent in a green tactical vest reading POLICE / HOMELAND SECURITY INVESTIGATIONS HSI stands beside a silver van; caption 'self-deport now.'

notable_text: with the support of; took place at an illegal cockfight location; and strengthening our local law enforcement partnerships; self-deport now; (tweet) leave now or expect an ICE arrest; ICE.gov/self-deport
